understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid and complete all levels by stepping onto goal cells with a piece whose shape, color, and rotation match the goal's requirements. Each level has one or more goal cells that must be activated and then stepped on. The game is won by completing all levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player moves on a grid using directional actions (MOVE_NORTH, MOVE_SOUTH, MOVE_EAST, MOVE_WEST). The piece has attributes: shape, color, and rotation. Modifier tiles change these attributes: shape modifiers cycle the shape, color modifiers cycle the color, and rotation modifiers rotate the piece 90 degrees clockwise. A goal cell activates when the piece's attributes match its requirements, indicated by the message 'ACTIVATED — your piece matches! Step on it to complete.' To complete the goal, the player must move onto the activated goal cell. Moving costs stamina, and running out of stamina costs a life. Losing all lives ends the game.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid and complete all levels by stepping onto goal cells with a piece whose shape, color, and rotation match the goal's requirements. Each level has one or more goal cells that must be activated and then stepped on. The game is won by completing all levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player moves on a grid using directional actions (MOVE_NORTH, MOVE_SOUTH, MOVE_EAST, MOVE_WEST). The piece has attributes: shape, color, and rotation. Modifier tiles change these attributes: shape modifiers cycle the shape, color modifiers cycle the color, and rotation modifiers rotate the piece 90 degrees clockwise. A goal cell activates when the piece's attributes match its requirements, indicated by the message 'ACTIVATED — your piece matches! Step on it to complete.' To complete the goal, the player must move onto the activated goal cell. Moving costs stamina, and running out of stamina costs a life. Losing all lives ends the game.
